zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé於1179年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特薩布萊-素-薩特時，她的父親Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master29歲，母親Clemence de Mayenne19歲。她於1191年與Guillaume des ROCHES結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年6月在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易艾庫福藍特享年59歲，埋葬在法國安喬艾庫福藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé于1179年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特薩布萊-素-薩特时，她的父亲Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master29岁，母亲Clemence de Mayenne19岁。她于1191年与Guillaume des ROCHES结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年6月在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易艾庫福藍特享年59岁，埋葬在法国安喬艾庫福藍特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sablé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a sandy place, from sable ‘sand’.
French (Sablé): habitational name from a place so called in Sarthe.

variants.name: Zabel
meanings: German: from Middle High German zabel ‘board game’ (from Latin tabula), hence a nickname for a habitual game player.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé was born in 1179, in Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master, was 29 and her mother, Clemence de Mayenne, was 19. She married Guillaume des ROCHES in 1191. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in June 1238, in Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Écouflant, Anjou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé est née en 1179, à Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Clemence de Mayenne, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume des ROCHES en 1191. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1238, à Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Écouflant, Anjou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé 1179 in Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master 29 und ihre Mutter Clemence de Mayenne 19. Sie hat 1191 Guillaume des ROCHES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Juni 1238 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Écouflant, Anjou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé è nata il nel 1179 nel Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Clemence de Mayenne, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume des ROCHES nel 1191. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1238, nel Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Écouflant, Anjou, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé(이)가 1179년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 사블e-수-사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence de Mayenne(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1191년 Guillaume des ROCHES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 6월 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 e코우플랜트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 앤조우 e코우플랜트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé nasceu em 1179, em Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Clemence de Mayenne, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume des ROCHES em 1191. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em junho de 1238, em Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Écouflant, Anjou, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé родилась в 1179 г. в местности саблe-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence de Mayenne, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume des ROCHES в 1191 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла июнь 1238 г. в местности eкоуфлант, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности eкоуфлант, анджоу, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Sablé Dame de Sablé nació en 1179, en Sablé-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Robert of Sable IV,  11th Templar Grand Master, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Clemence de Mayenne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Guillaume des ROCHES en 1191. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en junio de 1238, en Écouflant, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Écouflant, Anjou, Francia.
